zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward Seymour 1st Duke of Somerset於1506年出生在英國薩默塞特謝普頓 比奧甘時，他的父親Sir John Seymour32歲，母親Margery Wentworth28歲。他於1527年之前與Catherine Fillol在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1552年1月22日在英國米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦享年46歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward Seymour 1st Duke of Somerset于1506年出生在英国薩默塞特謝普頓 比奧甘时，他的父亲Sir John Seymour32岁，母亲Margery Wentworth28岁。他于1527年之前与Catherine Fillol在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1552年1月22日在英国米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦享年46岁，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Seymour
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London): of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (Seine), and possibly also from Saint-Maur-des-Bois (Manche) and Saint-Maur-sur-Loire (Touraine), named from the dedication of their churches to Saint Maur (see   Moore   3). The family of this name who have held the title Duke of Somerset since 1547 are said by some to have originated in Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (Seine), while others claim they are from Saint-Maur-sur-Loire (Touraine). They rose to prominence under the Tudors, when Edward Seymour (died 1552) held a high position of office under Henry VIII, who was married to Edward's sister, Jane. The Norman name has been established in Ireland since at least the 17th century.

variants.name: Moore
meanings: English: from Middle English more ‘moor, marsh, fen’ (Old English mōr), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in such a place, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, as for example Moore in Cheshire or More in Shropshire.
English (of Norman origin): ethnic name from Old French more ‘Moor’, either someone from North Africa or, more often, a nickname for someone thought to resemble a Moor. Compare Morrell and Moreau .

English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name More (Old French More, Maur, Latin Maurus), originally denoting either ‘Moor’ or someone with a swarthy complexion (compare Morrell , Morrin , Morris , and sense 2 above). There was a 6th-century Christian saint of this name.

variants.name: Semar
meanings: Germanized form of French Saint Marc, the name of a Huguenot family that migrated to the Palatinate.
English: variant of   Seymour  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward Seymour 1st Duke of Somerset was born in 1506, in Shepton Beauchamp, Somerset, England, his father, Sir John Seymour, was 32 and his mother, Margery Wentworth, was 28. He married Catherine Fillol before 1527, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 22 January 1552, in Tower of London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward Seymour 1st Duke of Somerset est né en 1506, à Shepton Beauchamp, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Seymour, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margery Wentworth, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Fillol avant 1527, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 22 janvier 1552, à Tower of London, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Seymour 1st Duke of Somersetが1506年にイギリスソメルセトシェプトン ビーウチャンップで生まれた時，父Sir John Seymourは32歳，母Margery Wentworthは28歳であった。1527年以前にイギリスイギリスでCatherine Fillolと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1552年1月22日にイギリスミッドレセックストウエル オフ ロンドンで46歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Seymour 1st Duke of Somerset(이)가 1506년 영국 서머세트 셰프턴 보챔프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Seymour(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Wentworth(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1527년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Catherine Fillol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1552년 1월 22일 영국 미들레세스 타워 프 런던에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Seymour 1st Duke of Somerset nasceu em 1506, em Shepton Beauchamp, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Seymour, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margery Wentworth, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Fillol antes 1527, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 22 de janeiro de 1552, em Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward Seymour 1st Duke of Somerset родился в 1506 г. в местности шептон бочамп, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Seymour было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Wentworth, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Fillol перед 1527 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 22 января 1552 г. в местности тоуир оф лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия.
